name: Roanoke County Public Schools
districtFact: Roanoke County Public Schools is a public school district in Roanoke County, Virginia. RCPS publishes multi-page accessible academic calendar PDFs with student attendance days, teacher workdays, grading periods, early dismissals, virtual learning days, conferences, graduation ceremonies, and make-up day procedures.

about.title: About Roanoke County Public Schools
about.content: Roanoke County Public Schools (RCPS) is a public school district located in Roanoke County, Virginia, in the Roanoke Valley. The district academic calendar lists teacher workdays, the first student day, grading periods, interim dates, report cards, parent and student conference days, holidays, winter break, spring break, high school virtual learning days, early dismissals, graduation ceremonies, and make-up day order.

about.title: How to Use This RCPS Calendar
about.content: Use this page for districtwide school-year planning. Families should confirm school-specific events, bell schedules, graduation assignments, weather make-up decisions, and program calendars through Roanoke County Public Schools and their assigned school.

planningTips.title: Planning Tips for Roanoke County Families
content: Review the make-up day schedule before booking travel near January, February, and March teacher workdays.
Track three-hour early dismissals separately because elementary and secondary dismissal times differ.
Watch high school virtual learning days because they apply only to high schools.
Check the official RCPS academic calendar page for revised accessible PDFs and school board updates.

customSections.label: Roanoke County Public Schools District Profile
customSections.content: Roanoke County Public Schools serves families across Roanoke County, Virginia and the surrounding Roanoke Valley. The district calendar is built around a traditional public school schedule, but it includes more planning detail than a simple holiday list: make-up day procedures, high school virtual learning days, three-hour early dismissals, conferences, grading periods, report card timing, and graduation ceremonies all appear in the official RCPS academic calendar. This matters locally because weather-related closures and make-up decisions in the Roanoke Valley can affect teacher workdays, transportation routines, childcare plans, and scheduled breaks. Families using this page should treat it as a searchable planning reference for districtwide dates while confirming school-specific programs, bell schedules, athletics, and last-minute weather updates directly with Roanoke County Public Schools.

groups.label: What This Adds
items: Connects the RCPS calendar to Roanoke County, Virginia and the Roanoke Valley.
Explains why make-up days, early dismissals, and high school virtual learning dates matter for family planning.
Clarifies that school-specific events and weather-related updates should still be confirmed with RCPS.

customSections.label: Related Roanoke County Calendars
customSections.content: Use these related calendar pages to compare RCPS school years and nearby Virginia district schedules.

links.label: Virginia Beach City Public Schools Calendar

compareIntro: Compare the Roanoke County Public Schools calendar with other Virginia district calendars currently available on MySchoolDates. Dates shown include the first day, last day, and spring break.

districtFaqs.q: Is this the official Roanoke County school calendar?
districtFaqs.a: This page is an independent reference that summarizes the official RCPS academic calendar PDFs for the listed school years. The official Roanoke County Public Schools calendar page remains the source of record for final updates.

districtFaqs.q: Does Roanoke County list make-up days?
districtFaqs.a: Yes. The official calendars include banked days and a make-up order that may convert selected teacher workdays or add time if needed.

districtFaqs.q: Where should families verify RCPS calendar updates?
districtFaqs.a: Use the official Roanoke County Public Schools academic calendar page and school announcements for final confirmation. MySchoolDates is an independent reference and is not affiliated with RCPS.
